fields.label: Store URL
fields.description: WooCommerce store URL used as the REST API host. Use the HTTPS URL of the WordPress site where WooCommerce is installed.

fields.label: Consumer Key
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer key used as the Basic Auth username. Create keys in WordPress admin under WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API.

fields.label: Consumer Secret
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer secret used as the Basic Auth password.

fields.label: WordPress Username
fields.description: Optional WordPress username used only for media uploads through the WordPress REST API.

fields.label: WordPress Application Password
fields.placeholder: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx
fields.description: Optional WordPress application password used only for media uploads through /wp-json/wp/v2/media.

actions.name: add_order_note
actions.description: Add an administrator or customer-visible note to one WooCommerce order.

note.description: The note body to add to the order.

customerNote.description: Whether the note should be visible to the customer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for adding a WooCommerce order note.

anyOf.description: The note creation timestamp in the store timezone.

customerNote.description: Whether the note is visible to the customer.

actions.name: create_coupon
actions.description: Create a WooCommerce coupon.

amount.description: The coupon amount as a decimal string.

individualUse.description: Whether the coupon can only be used individually.

excludeSaleItems.description: Whether sale items should be excluded from the coupon.

freeShipping.description: Whether the coupon grants free shipping.

dateExpires.description: The coupon expiration date in the store timezone.

minimumAmount.description: The minimum spend amount required for the coupon.

maximumAmount.description: The maximum spend amount allowed for the coupon.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a WooCommerce coupon.

anyOf.description: The coupon amount as returned by WooCommerce.
The coupon creation timestamp in the store timezone.
The coupon update timestamp in the store timezone.

actions.name: create_order
actions.description: Create a WooCommerce order with customer, address, line item, and coupon fields.

customerId.description: The WooCommerce customer ID for the order.

firstName.description: The first name on the address.

lastName.description: The last name on the address.

company.description: The company name on the address.

state.description: The state, region, or province code.

email.description: The email address on the address.

phone.description: The phone number on the address.

code.description: The coupon code to apply to the order.

actions.description: Upload one media file to the WordPress media library used by WooCommerce.

Whether the requested media metadata update was applied.
